india_fit.price_band_reason: Mirror embroidery adds visual richness at minimal cost; production feasible in ₹399–₹1,499 range with semi-automated or hand techniques.
india_fit.climate_fit_reason: Mirror embroidery adds weight and reduces breathability, problematic in Indian heat/monsoon, but acceptable for cooler months and festive occasions.
india_fit.cultural_fit_reason: Mirror embroidery aligns with Indian traditional aesthetics, modesty norms, and celebratory wear expectations.
india_fit.value_fashion_fit_reason: Target audience (Meesho, Vishal Mega Mart customers) actively seeks affordable festive/ethnic wear; mirror embroidery signals occasion value.

claude_synthesis.convergence_summary: Weak marketplace velocity and low baseline search volume conflict with rising Google Trends interest and indexed social mentions, suggesting early-stage awareness rather than proven demand.
claude_synthesis.bet_reasoning: Google Trends shows rising interest in 'mirror embroidery' broadly, and 10 indexed social mentions indicate real conversation among online communities. However, only 10 marketplace results across Myntra/Meesho and zero direct keyword traction suggest this is an emerging niche, not yet mainstream value-fashion consumption. This warrants cautious small SKU pilot rather than bulk buy.
claude_synthesis.skepticism_flag: The 'rising trend' tag in Google Trends is unvalidated by actual marketplace search volume; mirror embroidery may be trending among design influencers/social creators without corresponding customer purchase intent in the value-fashion segment, creating a visibility-to-sales gap.
